action.reasoning: Observation: Best test balanced accuracy is 0.8346 with best_s1.pt. Two ConvNeXt models have complementary strengths - best_s1.pt is better at few-shot (0.7639 vs 0.7429) while best.pt is better at many-shot (0.9135 vs 0.9091). Analysis: Ensembling these models could combine their complementary strengths. I need to test on val first to find optimal weights before committing an eval. Decision: Write predict.py with ensemble support and test_ensemble.py to sweep weights on val set. Run test first, then submit eval next iteration with best weights.
